/usr/bin/ar qc libaws-c-cal.a "CMakeFiles/aws-c-cal.dir/source/cal.c.o" "CMakeFiles/aws-c-cal.dir/source/der.c.o" "CMakeFiles/aws-c-cal.dir/source/ecc.c.o" "CMakeFiles/aws-c-cal.dir/source/ed25519.c.o" "CMakeFiles/aws-c-cal.dir/source/hash.c.o" "CMakeFiles/aws-c-cal.dir/source/hkdf.c.o" "CMakeFiles/aws-c-cal.dir/source/hmac.c.o" "CMakeFiles/aws-c-cal.dir/source/rsa.c.o" "CMakeFiles/aws-c-cal.dir/source/shared/ed25519.c.o" "CMakeFiles/aws-c-cal.dir/source/shared/lccrypto_common.c.o" "CMakeFiles/aws-c-cal.dir/source/shared/ref_hkdf.c.o" "CMakeFiles/aws-c-cal.dir/source/symmetric_cipher.c.o" "CMakeFiles/aws-c-cal.dir/source/unix/openssl_aes.c.o" "CMakeFiles/aws-c-cal.dir/source/unix/openssl_platform_init.c.o" "CMakeFiles/aws-c-cal.dir/source/unix/openssl_rsa.c.o" "CMakeFiles/aws-c-cal.dir/source/unix/opensslcrypto_ecc.c.o" "CMakeFiles/aws-c-cal.dir/source/unix/opensslcrypto_hash.c.o" "CMakeFiles/aws-c-cal.dir/source/unix/opensslcrypto_hmac.c.o"
/usr/bin/ranlib libaws-c-cal.a
